title: EasyJet flight diverts to Rome over power bank in luggage
description: Many airlines have toughened their rules on power banks, often requiring that they be stored in hand luggage not checked luggage.
content:
A UK-bound EasyJet flight was diverted to Rome after a power bank was found to be charging in a passenger's luggage, it has been revealed.
Flight EZY2618 from Hurghada in Egypt to London Luton landed in the Italian capital on Tuesday night as a "prec... [1815 chars]

title: West Ham relegated to Championship despite emphatic victory over toothless Leeds
description: West Ham beat Leeds 3-0 thanks to second-half goals from Taty Castellanos, Jarrod Bowen and Callum Wilson but Spurs’ win over Everton condemned the Hammers to the Championship
content: As the minutes ticked away and the trap door widened, the home crowd made light of the misery and amused themselves by turning on the man who has done more than anyone to condemn West Ham to relegation. David Sullivan watched and squired. The West Ha... [4351 chars]

title: Emma Raducanu slumps to straight-sets defeat in French Open first round
description: Emma Raducanu lost 6-0, 7-6 (4) against Argentina’s Solana Sierra but Fran Jones won at a grand slam for the first time, in three sets against Beatriz Haddad Maia
content: Twenty minutes into her time at the 2026 French Open, Emma Raducanu already appeared to be on her way out. Trailing 0-4, 30-40 on her serve, the games falling from her at warp speed, this was the moment for Raducanu to fight, to at least try to keep ... [4196 chars]

title: Hackney Central station closed after fire engulfs static caravan
description: Services have been suspended from Hackney Central station while firefighters tackle a huge blaze on a nearby residential road.
content:
Services have been suspended from Hackney Central after a huge blaze erupted on a nearby residential road.
The fire at Cottrill Gardens in east London sparked at around 6.10pm.
